[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001001000 2
1 1111000011 6
2 0011000100 3
3 1110011101 7
4 1101010111 7
5 1111111111 a

7 1011101000 5
